title: Bitcoin ETFs post June's biggest daily outflows as BTC falls below $60K
summary: US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $696.3 million in outflows as Bitcoin slipped below $60,000, lifting year-to-date losses to $4.6 billion.

title: Polymarket hit by $2.9M theft, users to be refunded
summary: Polymarket said it contained the compromise and removed the affected dependency after attackers injected a malicious script into its frontend.

title: Gold Climbs Above $4,000 After Inflation Print Slows Decline
summary: Gold climbed above $4,000 an ounce on Friday after the latest US inflation print tempered expectations for an interest-rate hike, capping a tumultuous week that saw bullion slump to the lowest since November.

title: AI Cost Reality Check Hits Asia Tech Stocks as Apple Hikes Price
summary: Asian technology stocks slumped after Apple Inc. and Microsoft Corp. raised prices for their products, stoking concern that rising component costs will curb demand for devices and eventually slow the memory chip rally that has powered much of the AI trade.

title: Anthropic Urges Congress to Crack Down on AI Distillation By Chinese Rivals
summary: Anthropic alleged that Alibaba-affiliated operators used nearly 25,000 fraudulent accounts to generate 28.8 million Claude exchanges.

title: Polymarket to Refund Users After Scammers Swipe Millions in Website Exploit
summary: Hackers infiltrated Polymarket’s website via a compromised third-party vendor, the company said, swiping millions in crypto from users.

title: Base delays Beryl hard fork over B20 registry timing issue
summary: Base delayed its Beryl mainnet upgrade to June 26 to give the B20 Activation Registry time to become fully operational.

title: Bitcoin ETF Flows Explained: What ETF Inflows and Outflows Mean for Investors
summary: Bitcoin ETF flows refer to the movement of money into and out of bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs). When investors buy ETF shares, new money enters the fund and creates an inflow.
